_comment: Panel layout INPUT for the thermal analysis. 'C' = SCA (solar cell), '.' = bare section (no cell). Cell optics come from the cell JSON; bare optics from the substrate JSON. The bare block is a no-SCA region (e.g. a cut-out / instrument keep-out) that runs hotter and warms its neighbours.
name: G2G panel (cells + bare keep-out)
